creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
1) This PR now superceeds ports/121160, please close at the same time.

2) Update 1.04 -> 1.05
    Update pkg-plist for new viewsvn template view
    (by default not used)

3) Conditionally bring in www/apache2{0,2} and/or www/mod_python3
    defaulting to off for both.

4) Claim maintainership
    See ports/121160

5) Document WITH_MODPYTHON3 in KNOBS
